# Fly Friendly

Fly Friendly helps airline passengers check eligibility and manage claims for delayed, canceled, overbooked, or missed-connection flights.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://fly-friendly.com/en)
- [Check compensation](https://fly-friendly.com/en/claim/eligibility)
- [About Fly Friendly](https://fly-friendly.com/en/about)
- [Blog](https://fly-friendly.com/en/blog)
- [Contact](https://fly-friendly.com/en/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://fly-friendly.com/en/privacyPolicy)
- [Terms of Use](https://fly-friendly.com/en/terms)
- [Sitemap](https://fly-friendly.com/sitemap.xml)
